# terrible_community_general_lbu (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `commit` (Boolean) Control whether to commit changed files.
- `exclude` (String) List of paths to exclude.
- `include` (String) List of paths to include.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) Error message.
